title: 11 Lives, 11 Lies
tone: Atmospheric paranoia escalating into ethical confrontation

setting.place: A decaying Art Deco mansion on the Portuguese Atlantic coast near Vento de Sal

chapter_outline: Ch1 arrival and heartbeat in the walls
Ch3 lab breach and vial discovery
Ch5 tracker confession and moral dilemma
Ch6 forfeit pressure and lab entrapment
Ch8 Amelia reveal and true inheritance
Ch9 betrayal timeline and cliff ledge fall
Ch10 final test and system activation
Ch11 buyers assault and greenhouse sacrifice
world_rules: The laboratory wing opens by biometric genetic match keyed to Amelia.
Elara can access the lab due to hidden biological relation to Amelia.
The vial labeled FOR ELARA is a biometric activator for main vent controls.
Maria follows pre-sealed envelopes, not live instructions.
Five heir deaths within 30 days trigger estate forfeit under executor oversight.
The vents are geothermal infrastructure, not a medical cure.
writing_rules: Use sensory motifs: salt, fog, house groan, vent hum.
End chapter with a sensory cliffhanger.
Keep character tells consistent across scenes.
